data.content:
B人員
B人员是负责处理维护工作的工程师，其主要职责包括管理与维护相关的文档和信息、执行具体的维修操作，并直接服务于C客户。具体来说，B人员不仅需要记录和管理维护活动的相关数据，还需直接参与到实际的维护工作中去，以确保系统的稳定运行和客户的满意。

B人员的主要工作内容可以分为两个方面：一是管理和维护相关文档与信息；二是参与具体的维护任务。在日常工作中，他们负责处理维护记录，并执行一系列的实际维修操作。例如，在2026年1月5日的特定时间段内（从下午1点30分至下午5点30分），B人员就具体进行了某项维护工作。

此外，不同描述中提到的一些细节差异并不影响整体职责定义的一致性。所有描述都一致地强调了B人员在处理C客户维护工作的核心角色，并且他们承担着记录管理与实际操作的双重任务。无论是从文档和信息的管理角度还是从直接执行维修活动的角度来看，B人员都是一个全面负责维护工作的工程师角色。

综上所述，B人员是一个集管理和实施于一身的工程师，在确保系统稳定运行的同时满足客户的维护需求。<SEP>B人員is the engineer responsible for handling the maintenance tasks.<SEP>B人員is the handling engineer responsible for the maintenance work.<SEP>B人員is the engineer responsible for handling D客户的maintenance record.<SEP>B人員is the engineer who handled the maintenance work on 2025/10/20.<SEP>B人员is the engineer who handled the maintenance service.

Splunk駐點服務202510第一周
Splunk驻点服务202510第一周是一次特定时间的服务活动，涉及多项操作和更新任务。

C客戶
C客户（C客戶）是一个实体，代表了一个组织或接受维护服务的客户。描述强调了C客户作为接收维护服务的一方，并且多个实体都指出维护记录是专门为这个组织保持和文档化的。这包括与该组织相关的所有维护活动的记录。这些描述明确表示，C客户在接收和拥有相关维护服务记录方面扮演着组织或客户的角色。

C客户是指那些接受维护服务并有相应维护记录保存下来的客户。具体而言，它是一个客户实体，其维护记录被详细地保持并文档化。这包括了对因该客户提供而进行的所有维护活动的记录。

从多个描述中可以看出，尽管表述方式有所不同，但所有描述都一致地强调C客户是接受维护服务的一方，并且与这些服务相关的维护记录会被完整地保存和文档化。无论是称其为“组织”还是“客户”，核心要点都是相同的：即C客户是一个接收特定维护服务的实体，相关活动及记录被严格管理和记录下来。

简而言之，C客户是接受并有与其维护服务相关的详细记录保存的一个客户或组织。<SEP>C客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are kept.<SEP>C客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are kept.<SEP>C客戶is the client for whom maintenance work was carried out.

src="172.*"
Src="172.*"是用于筛选特定来源IP地址范围的数据过滤规则。

geodb
Geodb是一个数据库或数据文件，在维护过程中进行了更新。<SEP>Geodb是需要更新的数据库。<SEP>Geodb is a database that was updated as part of the maintenance work.

告警PWLAN觸發IPS高風險告警
告警PWLAN触发的IPS高风险告警是一种系统警告，描述了源地址为172.*的事件从原IPS高风险告警中独立出来的情况。

Tokyo
The World Athletics Championship hosted in Tokyo is governed by the World Athletics Federation.

World Athletics Federation
World Athletics Federation, also known as World Athletics, is a governing body that oversees global athletics events and record validations. It plays a crucial role in managing and regulating various aspects of international athletic competitions, including the prestigious World Athletics Championships. The organization ensures compliance with rules and regulations for these events, thereby maintaining standardization and fairness across different countries and regions where such championships take place. Additionally, it is responsible for validating records set by athletes during these global competitions, contributing to the integrity and reliability of athletic achievements worldwide.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation oversees global athletics competitions like the World Athletics Championship.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation oversees the World Athletics Championship and validates athletic records.

C人員
C人员, also known as C人員, is an engineer with a significant role in managing and executing maintenance tasks for multiple clients including B客户 (B客戶), E客户 (E客戶), and A客户 (A客戶). This versatile engineer ensures that all processes run smoothly by maintaining proper records for maintenance activities across these clients. Specifically, C人员 plays a critical part in maintaining system integrity and operational efficiency through oversight of task execution and documentation activities.

In the context of B客户的系统, C人员 is responsible for ensuring that all processes are running smoothly and maintains proper records for maintenance activities. On December 2, 2025, C人员 handles various tasks related to the maintenance record for E客户, focusing on maintaining their Splunk system through thorough documentation and task execution. Additionally, C人员 oversees and documents maintenance activities across multiple clients while specifically focusing on technical support for E客户的 systems.

C人员's responsibilities encompass conducting regular maintenance work and ensuring that all necessary documentation and tasks are carried out with precision and efficiency across different client environments. This includes reinforcing their role as a versatile engineer capable of handling various clients' maintenance needs effectively, such as the maintenance process at A客户. C人员 is also responsible for maintaining system health and integrity by managing proper records and overseeing task execution.

Furthermore, descriptions indicate that C人员 is involved in the maintenance process alongside A人員, specifically focusing on the maintenance of E客户的systems and B客户服务 (B客户的系统 or equipment). This highlights C人员’s comprehensive involvement in maintaining system health and ensuring operational reliability across different client environments.<SEP>C人員is another handling engineer for B客户的维护记录。<SEP>C人員is another engineer involved in handling the maintenance record for B客戶.

Splunk工作事項- 0729
Splunk工作事項- 0729 refers to specific work items related to Splunk operations on July 29th, 2025.

E客戶
E客户是指那些维护记录被保存的客户组织。这些记录详细记载了C人员为E客户提供过的维护工作，包括针对Splunk系统的维护服务。E客户不仅是接受过维修工作的实体，而且是其维护活动被记录下来的对象。总的来说，E客户是一个或多个人或组织，他们曾从特定服务提供方（如涉及的C人员）处接收过维护支持，并且这些互动和相关的维护工作都被详细记录下来以供后续参考和服务改进之用。

除了Splunk系统之外，E客户的维护记录还涵盖了驻点工作事项及相关行动的具体细节。这表明E客户不仅限于使用Splunk服务并需要维护的实体，还包括那些其维护活动涉及到SASE VPN登录报告等其他方面的工作内容。因此，E客户是一个多维度的概念，既可以是接受Splunk系统维护支持的企业或组织，也可以是涉及各种驻点工作事项和具体行动记录的实体。

总的来说，E客户是指一个或多个人或组织，它们从特定服务提供方处接收过维护支持，并且这些互动及其相关的维护活动都被详细记录下来以供后续参考和服务改进之用。这种详细的记录不仅涵盖了Splunk系统的维护，还包括驻点工作事项和具体的行动细节等多方面内容。<SEP>E客戶is a client for whom maintenance records are kept, involving Splunk software and services.<SEP>E客戶is the client for whom maintenance activities were performed.<SEP>E客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are kept.<SEP>E客戶is a client organization for which maintenance records are kept.

Identity新增title(職稱)
Adding a title field to identities as part of maintenance actions.

Noah Carter
The World Athletics Federation oversees Noah Carter's record-breaking performance and validates his achievement.

Splunk升版完成
Splunk version upgrade completion is an action item mentioned in the record, indicating that an update to Splunk has been successfully completed.<SEP>Splunk version upgrade completion refers to the task completed during the maintenance work.

Cutting-Edge Technology
Cutting-edge technology refers to the advanced techniques and equipment used by athletes to improve their performance. This technology includes various innovative tools and materials, such as carbon-fiber spikes, which are designed to enhance an athlete's capabilities in specific domains like athletics. The use of cutting-edge technology represents a significant advancement in athletic performance, providing athletes with the most effective equipment available to help them perform at their best.

Cutting-edge technology continuously evolves through ongoing innovation, ensuring that athletes have access to refined and advanced tools that can significantly improve their performance. This includes advancements such as carbon-fiber spikes, which reflect the continuous development and refinement of athletic gear to meet the evolving needs of athletes. These innovations are crucial for enabling athletes to leverage cutting-edge equipment to maximize their capabilities and achieve superior results in competitive settings.

It is important to note that while these descriptions consistently emphasize the role of carbon-fiber spikes as a key example of cutting-edge technology, one description specifically mentions Noah Carter, which may indicate a specific application or usage by this individual. However, without additional context regarding Noah Carter's unique contribution or involvement with such technology, it can be understood generally in the broader context of athletic performance enhancement.

Overall, cutting-edge technology encompasses advanced materials and designs that aim to provide significant performance advantages for athletes, reflecting ongoing innovation in the field of athletic equipment and techniques.<SEP>Cutting-edge technology refers to advanced innovations like carbon-fiber spikes used by athletes for enhanced performance.<SEP>Cutting-edge technology refers to advanced innovations such as carbon-fiber spikes used by Noah Carter for performance enhancement.<SEP>Cutting-edge technology refers to advanced innovations like carbon-fiber spikes used by athletes for improved performance.

A人員
A人員 is a maintenance engineer who plays a crucial role in system maintenance and documentation across multiple clients. This comprehensive role includes managing technical upkeep, maintaining detailed records for various organizations, and ensuring that systems remain operational and well-documented.

Specifically, A人員 handles direct involvement in several maintenance tasks, including the management of maintenance records on specific dates such as November 5, 2025, and performing system maintenance work directly. This includes both technical aspects and documentation responsibilities. The descriptions indicate that A人員 is involved in handling maintenance tasks for clients like B客户, G客户提供的重要系统维护工作, and F客户提供的重要系统维护工作.

While some descriptions emphasize A人員's specific tasks with particular clients such as B客戶 and G客户提供的重要系统维护工作, others highlight a broader responsibility that includes additional clients like F客户提供的重要系统维护工作. This broad range of responsibilities underscores A人员’s comprehensive approach to system management, ensuring efficient service delivery for multiple organizations through both direct maintenance activities and record-keeping.

In summary, A人員's duties encompass not only the execution of direct maintenance tasks but also the upkeep of detailed records and technical documentation necessary for maintaining operational efficiency across different clients. This role is critical in ensuring that systems remain well-documented and functional, thereby making A人员’s contributions essential to overall service delivery efficiency.<SEP>A人員is the engineer responsible for maintaining B客户的systems.<SEP>A人員is the engineer responsible for handling B客戶's maintenance on 2025/12/04.<SEP>A人員is one of the handling engineers for B客户的维护记录。<SEP>A人員is one of the engineers involved in handling the maintenance record for B客戶.

Carbon-Fiber Spikes
Carbon-Fiber Spikes are advanced sprinting shoes designed specifically for track and field sprinting disciplines. These shoes are constructed from carbon fiber, a material renowned for its lightweight and durable properties. The use of carbon fiber ensures that Carbon-Fiber Spikes offer superior performance benefits such as improved acceleration and better grip on various surfaces. They are essential tools for top-tier sprinters aiming to optimize their performance during events where quick starts and rapid changes in direction are critical.

Carbon-Fiber Spikes have been utilized by professional athletes like Noah Carter, who used them to gain competitive advantages during sprint events. These shoes provide enhanced speed and traction, making them a crucial component in achieving optimal athletic performance. The design of Carbon-Fiber Spikes is specifically engineered for the demands of sprinting disciplines, ensuring that athletes can maximize their potential through superior grip and acceleration provided by the advanced material composition.

In summary, Carbon-Fiber Spikes are high-performance shoes made from carbon fiber, offering enhanced speed and traction to professional sprinters. They play a vital role in helping athletes like Noah Carter achieve competitive success in sprint events by leveraging the unique properties of carbon fiber for improved performance metrics.<SEP>Advanced sprinting shoes made from carbon fiber that provide enhanced speed and traction.<SEP>Carbon-fiber spikes are advanced sprinting shoes used by Noah Carter to enhance performance during the 100m sprint at the World Athletics Championship.<SEP>Advanced sprinting shoes used by Noah Carter to break the 100m sprint record at the World Athletics Championship.<SEP>Carbon-fiber spikes are advanced sprinting shoes used by athletes like Noah Carter to enhance performance.<SEP>Carbon-fiber spikes are advanced sprinting shoes that provide enhanced speed and traction.

B客戶
B客户，也称为B客戶，指的是那些与服务提供者之间存在持续服务关系的个人或企业实体。这些客户需要详细的维护记录被保存和文档化，以便于后续参考和管理。具体而言，无论是从单次服务还是长期合作的角度来看，所有关于B客户的维护活动都会被详细记录下来，并且这些维护记录会被妥善保存以备日后使用。此外，描述中还提到，B客户是指接受维护服务的组织或公司，强调了其作为需要持续维护和管理对象的身份。

B客戶不仅是一个单一的个人或企业实体，它还包括多个方面的特征。首先，它是那些与服务提供者之间存在长期合作关系的组织或公司。其次，对于B客户的维护记录会详细记载系统状态以及针对系统的建议事项。这些详细的维护记录包括但不限于维护活动的历史、具体的系统状况评估和相关的改进措施推荐。

综上所述，B客户特指那些其维护历史被详细记录并文档化的个体或企业客户，并且这些客户通常是指接受持续维护服务的组织或公司。维护记录中不仅包含基本的服务信息，还包括系统的当前状态及对未来的建议与规划。

FISAC

B部門
**B部門**

B部門是负责多项任务的一个重要部门，主要职责包括FIasc情报获取、IDX集群中添加索引器（indexers）、维护活动以及数据收集等。该部门具体参与的工作范围非常广泛，涉及FIsac智能检索和索引同步等功能的开发与优化，并且正在进行SH KVstore引擎异常测试的相关工作。此外，B部門还为客户提供维护服务，涵盖了从情报搜集到技术支持等一系列操作。这些任务不仅包括技术层面的数据处理和系统维护，同时也涉及到业务端的具体需求响应和支持。综上所述，B部門在组织内部承担着关键的技术支持和服务保障角色。<SEP>B部門is another department within the same organization performing different maintenance tasks.

James

新增indexer
#新增indexer is the process of adding new indexers to the IDX cluster for monitoring purposes.<SEP>Adding an indexer to the IDX cluster node, currently observing index synchronization status.

Splunk每週onsite
#Splunk每週onsite, commonly referred to as the weekly on-site work for Splunk maintenance and management, involves regular on-site support and maintenance activities conducted by engineers for B客戶 using Splunk. This includes a range of duties such as system checks, software updates, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring optimal performance of Splunk systems. The specific service is provided by A人員 and C人員 who perform these tasks regularly to maintain the integrity and functionality of Splunk installations at B客戶's location.

The activities under #Splunk每週onsite encompass a variety of responsibilities including but not limited to software maintenance, system checks, and resolving technical issues as they arise. Engineers involved in this process are responsible for conducting thorough reviews and implementing necessary changes to ensure that the Splunk environment remains stable and up-to-date. This service is critical for maintaining the efficiency and reliability of B客戶's Splunk systems.

In summary, #Splunk每週onsite represents a comprehensive set of weekly on-site maintenance activities designed to support and enhance the performance of Splunk systems at B客户的 premises through the consistent efforts of A人员和C人员.<SEP>#Splunk每週onsite refers to weekly on-site work related to Splunk.

A部門
A部門 is a department that specializes in the maintenance and management of Splunk systems, particularly within the context of B客戶's organization. It handles a variety of tasks related to system upkeep, including IP adjustments, software upgrades, NTP service checks, and daily onsite work for Splunk system maintenance.

Additionally, A部門 focuses on specific maintenance actions tailored to B客户, such as addressing role permission issues and managing monthly report triggers. The department also deals with the resolution of Splunk role capability anomalies and the configuration of Linux host user permissions.

In summary, A部門 is responsible for a comprehensive range of tasks aimed at ensuring the smooth operation and security of Splunk systems within B客戶's environment, encompassing both general maintenance duties and client-specific requirements.<SEP>A部門is a department within an organization where maintenance tasks were performed.

data.entity_name: audit.log持續累積(FCB147的keep_logs設定導致永不刪除)
data.content:
audit.log持續累積(FCB147的keep_logs設定導致永不刪除)
由于FCB147的keep_logs设置，审计日志持续积累导致FWD02磁盘空间不足。

estreamer資料暴增
estreamer数据激增导致了FWD02磁盘空间不足的问题。

/var/log/messages-20251214單一檔案達148GB
/var/log/messages-20251214文件大小达到148GB，占用了大量磁盘空间。

data.entity_name: rsyslog轉送設定(減少資料流入)
data.content:
rsyslog轉送設定(減少資料流入)
调整rsyslog转发设置以减少数据流进estreamer。

data.entity_name: clean.sh資料留存區間(定期清理舊資料，原為留存12小時，現改為6小時)
data.content:
clean.sh資料留存區間(定期清理舊資料，原為留存12小時，現改為6小時)
修改clean.sh脚本的数据保留时间从12小时缩短到6小时以减少数据累积。

data.entity_name: 手動刪除audit資料(釋放空間)
data.content:
手動刪除audit資料(釋放空間)
手动删除审计日志文件以释放磁盘空间。

/etc/cron.d/logrotate-syslog
/etc/cron.d/logrotate-syslog是一个定时任务，每2小时检查一次/var/log目录下的消息文件，并在超过1GB时自动旋转。

messages暴增處理
/etc/cron.d/logrotate-syslog定时任务用于监控并自动旋转/var/log目录下的消息文件，避免其体积过大。
